meaning: vi.牛拉车,艰苦跋涉vt.(牛)拉(货车),搬,运n.牛拉车旅行,艰苦跋涉
examples: How long did you trek for?
Last but not least, if you're hungry after a long day's trek I can recommend our local café.
It's a long trek into town.
My inexperienced soul bore it heavily, and I worry-warted my way through the trek.
Frakes: When I first auditioned, I had no idea what a cultural phenomenon Star Trek was.
